AGENTS.md.description: Project-level agent instructions and Sibu maintenance guidance.
changes: Tightens Sibu maintenance outcome guidance while preserving startup health checks, safety, confirmation, routing, and workflow repair instructions.
Configures Codex to use the root AGENTS.md instructions file.
Delegates Gemini project instructions to AGENTS.md as the source of truth.
Delegates Claude project instructions to AGENTS.md as the source of truth.

skills/clean-code/SKILL.md.description: Mandatory clean-code skill installed once at the shared .agents/skills workspace path.
changes: Installs the clean-code skill once at .agents/skills/clean-code/SKILL.md for any selected agent instead of duplicating per-agent copies.
Uses the shared .agents/skills workspace path to test common skill discovery across Codex, Gemini, and Claude.

skills/product-vision-writer/SKILL.md.description: Mandatory product vision writer skill installed once at the shared .agents/skills workspace path.
changes: Compresses discovery and drafting guidance while preserving one-question-at-a-time discovery, output location, incomplete-input handling, and product-vision quality expectations.

skills/feature-brief-writer/SKILL.md.description: Mandatory feature brief writer skill installed once at the shared .agents/skills workspace path.
changes: Compresses feature-brief guidance while preserving product-vision grounding, vague-request stop behavior, minimum context requirements, and feature brief output location.

skills/technical-design-writer/SKILL.md.description: Mandatory technical design writer skill installed once at the shared .agents/skills workspace path.
changes: Compresses technical-design wording while preserving required grounding, UX binding, delegation boundaries, output location, and smallest-useful-design guidance.

skills/typescript/SKILL.md.description: Selectable TypeScript skill installed when TypeScript language support is selected.
changes: Adds an optional TypeScript skill for projects that use .ts or .tsx files.

skills/golang/SKILL.md.description: Selectable Go skill installed when Go language support is selected.
changes: Adds an optional Go skill with concise, Effective Go–style guidance for .go files, package APIs, interfaces, errors, receivers, concurrency, and tests.

skills/architecture/ddd-hexagonal/SKILL..description: Selectable back-end architecture skill for DDD and Hexagonal Architecture.
changes: Adds an optional DDD + Hexagonal Architecture skill for projects that want opinionated back-end architecture guidance.

skills/architecture/command-pattern/SKIL.description: Selectable architecture skill for command-oriented vertical slices using Command Pattern, Hexagonal Architecture, and DDD principles.
changes: Reframes Command Pattern guidance around command-oriented vertical slices, feature-local ports, thin entrypoints, and infrastructure adapters.

skills/nextjs/SKILL.md.description: Selectable framework skill for Next.js App Router and framework-specific behavior.
changes: Adds an optional Next.js skill for projects that use App Router pages, layouts, route handlers, metadata, and Server/Client Component boundaries.

skills/react/SKILL.md.description: Selectable React skill for component design, props, state ownership, and presentational boundaries.
changes: Adds an optional React skill for projects that create or change React components, props, state ownership, or presentational and data-owning boundaries.

skills/scrum-master-planner/SKILL.md.description: Mandatory Scrum planner skill for creating pragmatic Epics and User Stories from approved feature and technical design docs.
changes: Compresses Scrum planning guidance while preserving required inputs, pragmatic story splitting, output paths, sequencing rules, and UX mockup binding.

skills/ai-implementation-planner/SKILL.m.description: Mandatory AI implementation planner skill for turning one approved User Story into small, story-local implementation step files.
changes: Compresses implementation-planning guidance while preserving exact story input requirements, source context, output path conventions, step-file format, and plan-quality checks.

skills/ai-implementation-plan-executor/S.description: Mandatory AI implementation plan executor skill for implementing existing story implementation plans one reviewed step at a time.
changes: Adds context reuse guidance so story implementation plans load broad context once, then continue step-by-step using cached context unless scope, validation, or file changes require rereading.

skills/ai-prompt-engineer-master/SKILL.m.description: Selectable AI prompt engineering skill for prompt creation, optimization, compression, and evaluation.
changes: Compresses the prompt quality checklist while preserving quality-first token discipline, missing-context behavior, output pattern, and prompt verification guidance.

skills/ux-expert/SKILL.md.description: Selectable UX expert skill for UI-changing features, responsive design, flows, states, accessibility, and binding mockups.
changes: Compresses UX guidance while preserving product grounding, no-code boundary, phone-first design, output location, concrete mockup requirements, and binding downstream mockup authority.
